import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { getCustomsData } from '../services/customsService'; const AdminTerminal = () => { const [customsData, setCustomsData] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { getCustomsData().then(data => setCustomsData(data)); }, []); return (
